user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Arc'teryx
Product type: Alpha SV hardshell jacket
Tone: rugged, performance-driven, premium
Visual style: Clean, minimalist imagery highlighting technical details and extreme outdoor environments.
Conceptual technique: authentic adventure storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Weatherproof Warrior
brief.caption: A lone climber stands half-buried in fresh snow against a sheer ice wall, with the Alpha SV jacket defying the storm as wind-swept flakes swirl around, showcasing its unmatched protection.
brief.visual_style: Clean, minimalist imagery highlighting technical details and extreme outdoor environments.
brief.call_to_action: Conquer the Elements with Alpha SV
brief.typography_style: Condensed sans-serif with a sturdy, no-nonsense feel
brief.color_scheme: Arctic white, deep glacier blue, and stone grey
